title: draba fladnizensis
intro: Draba fladnizensis, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is also said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Alpine Whitlow Grass can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in natural remedies to soothe and calm irritated skin.
